Class AdopterServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
shelter.service.impl.AdopterServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdopterService
public class AdopterServiceImpl extends Object implements AdopterService
Default implementation of AdopterService backed by an AdopterRepository. Delegates all persistence operations to the repository and enforces business rules such as duplicate prevention on registration.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    AdopterServiceImpl(AdopterRepository adopterRepository)
    Constructs an AdopterServiceImpl with the given repository.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdopterServiceImpl

      public AdopterServiceImpl(AdopterRepository adopterRepository)
      Constructs an AdopterServiceImpl with the given repository. The repository is used for all read and write operations on adopter records.
      Parameters:
      adopterRepository - the repository to delegate persistence to; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if adopterRepository is null

  • Method Details

    • register

      public void register(Adopter adopter)
      Registers a new adopter into the system. Throws an exception if the adopter is already registered or required fields are missing. Throws IllegalArgumentException if the adopter is already registered.
      Specified by:
      register in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to register

    • update

      public void update(Adopter adopter)
      Updates the information of an existing adopter record. Throws an exception if the adopter is not found in the system. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the adopter does not exist in the repository.
      Specified by:
      update in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter with updated information

    • remove

      public void remove(Adopter adopter)
      Removes an adopter from the system. Throws an exception if the adopter is not found or has a pending adoption request. Throws EntityNotFoundException if the adopter is not found.
      Specified by:
      remove in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      adopter - the adopter to remove

    • listAll

      public List<Adopter> listAll()
      Returns all adopters currently registered in the system. Returns an empty list if no adopters are registered.
      Specified by:
      listAll in interface AdopterService
      Returns:
      a list of all registered adopters

    • findById

      public Adopter findById(String id)
      Returns the adopter with the given ID. Throws an exception if no adopter with that ID is found. Throws EntityNotFoundException if no adopter with the given ID exists.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the adopter
      Returns:
      the matching adopter

    • registeredAfter

      public List<Adopter> registeredAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all adopters who registered after the given date. Returns an empty list if no adopters registered after that date. Registration date is not stored on Adopter; returns all adopters as a conservative fallback.
      Specified by:
      registeredAfter in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of adopters registered after the date

    • adoptedAfter

      public List<Adopter> adoptedAfter(LocalDate date)
      Returns all adopters who have at least one approved adoption after the given date. Returns an empty list if no such adopters exist. Returns adopters whose adopted animal list is non-empty as a conservative proxy for adoption date.
      Specified by:
      adoptedAfter in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      date - the cutoff date (exclusive)
      Returns:
      a list of adopters with an approved adoption after the date

    • adoptedAnimal

      public List<Adopter> adoptedAnimal(Animal animal)
      Returns all adopters who have adopted the given animal. Returns an empty list if no adopter has adopted the animal.
      Specified by:
      adoptedAnimal in interface AdopterService
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to query
      Returns:
      a list of adopters who adopted the animal
